# ITLibAlbum

**Class**

This class provides information about an album in the iTunes library.

## Declaration

```swift
class ITLibAlbum
```

## Overview

A *media item* is a track that iTunes associates with an album. See [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibMediaItem].

A *compilation* is an album with tracks from more than one source.

If an album is part of a *multiple-disc set*, [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibAlbum/discNumber] is the index of the album in the set.

To retrieve an [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibAlbum] instance, use the [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibMediaItem/album] property of [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibMediaItem].

## Getting Album Info

- **trackCount**: The number of tracks in the album.
- **title**: The title of the album.
- **sortTitle**: The title to use when sorting by album title.
- **rating**: The rating of the album.
- **isRatingComputed**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the system computes the rating of the album using the ratings of individual tracks in the album.
- **isGapless**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the album is gapless.
- **discNumber**: The index (1, 2, 3, and so on) of the disc within an album that’s a multiple-disc set.
- **discCount**: The number of discs in a multiple-disc set.
- **isCompilation**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the album is a compilation.
- **albumArtist**: The name of the artist iTunes associates with the album.
- **sortAlbumArtist**: The name to use when sorting by album artist.
- **persistentID**: The unique identifier of the album.

## Deprecated

- **artist**: The artist iTunes associates with the album.

## Albums and Playlists

- **ITLibPlaylist**: This class describes a playlist in the iTunes library.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
